cache_reuse_verdict.label_compatibility: SwissAI reuse_percentage = MEASURED bucket overlap; Mooncake cache_reuse_pct = DERIVED global-prefix-cache proxy. Same DEFINITION (reused_blocks/total_blocks) but different PROVENANCE; only a harmonized high_reuse proxy is cross-comparable.
cache_reuse_verdict.mooncake_only_caveat: Mooncake's high within-dataset gain is partly an ARTIFACT: the derived reuse proxy is autocorrelated and the decision-time rolling reuse-mean feature predicts it strongly; the per-trace baseline is near-degenerate (AUROC~0.5). Not evidence of measured alpha.
cache_reuse_verdict.reason: SwissAI-only (MEASURED label) beats its strong per-model baseline by 6.31%, but cross-dataset transfer does NOT beat the target's own baseline in both directions (mooncake->swissai AUROC 0.6071680399815405 vs swissai baseline 0.7149553272308133). No second MEASURED source validates it -> remains single-dataset.

transfer_vs_degenerate_cross_baseline.caveat: cross-dataset per-group baseline degrades to ~0.5 (source groups absent in target), so these % are INFLATED; use transfer_vs_target_own_baseline instead.

can_claim: Mooncake is a second INDEPENDENT reuse dataset (proxy-grade) consistent with SwissAI reuse structure
Huawei calibrates cold-start COST STRUCTURE for the simulator prior
Alibaba adds an instance-level scheduler-delay proxy
cannot_claim: cache_reuse_pct cross-dataset MEASURED validation (Mooncake label is derived)
GPU model-load cold-start forecasting from Huawei (FaaS != GPU)
measured serving autoscaling forecasting from Alibaba (proxy only)

remains_pilot_only: server-class GPU model_load_duration_s (Huawei is FaaS, calibration-only)
measured serving autoscaling events (Alibaba is instance-lifecycle proxy)
real per-request measured cache_hit (Mooncake reuse is derived proxy)
